## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy and implementation for Understory's blog](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy focuses on establishing Understory as an authority in integrated growth, balancing SEO with thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Understory needs CMS access set up; team will help implement blog functionality on WordPress](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Attribution will be tracked via Looker dashboard (GSC + GA4) and Scrunch for LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Goal: First piece of content live in 2-3 weeks, ramping up to 3-5 posts per week](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=2034.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [Four main pillars: B2B SaaS growth strategy, channel execution, SaaS buyer journey, and thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [Aim to differentiate from competitors (e.g. ColdIQ) by balancing SEO with authoritative content](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Focus on "all-bound" approach, integrating various channels (paid media, go-to-market engineering, RevOps)](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Incorporate Understory's unique voice and expertise through deep dives and leadership team input](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)

### Website and CMS Setup

  - [Current WordPress site needs blog functionality added](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [GrowthX team given admin access to implement necessary changes](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=1966.0)
  - [Considering future website redesign, but focusing on immediate blog setup for content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [GrowthX to provide content calendar with blog ideas for approval next week](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [Will generate sample blog post for review to align voice and tone](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Exploring options for featured images/illustrations that align with Understory's brand](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

### Attribution and Analytics

  - [Implementing Looker dashboard with GSC and GA4 data](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=2117.0)
  - [Setting up Scrunch for LLM visibility tracking](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=2169.0)
  - [Need to establish conversion event tracking for Calendly bookings in GA4](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=2305.0)

### Collaboration and Communication

  - [Weekly syncs to review progress and address questions](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [Slack channel for ongoing communication and asset sharing](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=2341.0)
  - [Understory team to provide brand assets and sales call insights for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=2207.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Understory to provide access to WordPress CMS (completed during call)](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=1966.0)
  - [GrowthX to share content strategy document in Slack for detailed review](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [Understory to share brand assets for featured image creation](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
  - [GrowthX to present content calendar and sample blog post next week](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [Explore setting up GA4 conversion event for Calendly bookings](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=2305.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin implementing blog functionality on WordPress site](https://fathom.video/share/RsuNjmZZGbhRx4TJTyy9ae7S-tnJroZ5?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
